hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message'); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd'); DIR="$(basename "$CWD"):$(echo "$CWD" | md5 -q | cut -c1-4)"; terminal-notifier -message "$MSG" -title "Claude ($DIR): Permission Needed" -sound Ping -group "$CWD:permission" -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

INPUT=$(cat); MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message'); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd'); DIR="$(basename "$CWD"):$(echo "$CWD" | md5 -q | cut -c1-4)"; terminal-notifier -message "$MSG" -title "Claude ($DIR): Question" -sound Ping -group "$CWD:question" -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

INPUT=$(cat); MSG=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message'); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd'); DIR="$(basename "$CWD"):$(echo "$CWD" | md5 -q | cut -c1-4)"; terminal-notifier -message "$MSG" -title "Claude ($DIR): Waiting" -group "$CWD:idle" -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

INPUT=$(cat); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd'); DIR="$(basename "$CWD"):$(echo "$CWD" | md5 -q | cut -c1-4)"; PREVIEW=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.last_assistant_message // "Response complete"' | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-80); terminal-notifier -message "$PREVIEW" -title "Claude ($DIR): Done" -group "$CWD:stop" -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm
